title: Create items via Text Message (SMS/MMS)
excerpt: Has anyone setup monday.com to have SMS/MMS messages open an item in monday.com? I’m helping someone setup a support ticketing system in monday.com, and they want to give people the ability to open a ticket in monday.com …

posts.author: ccarverIOI (Cody Carver)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anyone setup monday.com to have SMS/MMS messages open an item in monday.com? I’m helping someone setup a support ticketing system in monday.com, and they want to give people the ability to open a ticket in monday.com by text their issue in. It doesn’t need to do anything fancy, just create an item in monday.com with the body of the message stored somewhere (updates or in a column). Any ideas? I’m having trouble finding a solution to this.

Thanks!!!

posts.author: psperry (Accidental Selfie )
posts.cookedHtml: I thought maybe the Twilo integration could handle that and got a little excited, but it looks like it can’t. I will be following this thread. I can think of lots of cool applications.

posts.author: ccarverIOI (Cody Carver)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d also be willing to use a tool like make to be the bridge, I just want to identify some software that would help be the bridge between someone sending in an SMS and then creating an item from it. I’m still looking so I’ll let you know if I find anything @psperry.

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. @ccarverIOI @psperry

Extract marketplace app (see link below) extracts content from board updates. Currently we extract emails and sender names, and adds them to your board items so you can automate your CRM and helpdesk workflows without the need to manually copy and paste data.

We would love to learn more about the usecase of sending SMS to board. I assume that using SMS to email can help creating an update with SMS content. did you consider that?

Can you share more about your usecase and hopefully we can help with our app.
Thanks!

monday.com

monday.com: Apps Marketplace

monday.com apps marketplace, Expand the capabilities of your Work OS with monday apps

posts.author: psperry (Accidental Selfie )
posts.cookedHtml: @Nir-Jetpack, Thanks for the response. I think @ccarverIOI was referring to INCOMING texts being used to generate items. I am not currently aware of a product that can receive incoming texts. Once the text is in Monday, a product like yours could be very useful.

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Not sure what SMS hose you are using but for example twilio lets you forward sms to email.

Twilio

Forward SMS to Email

With Twilio, unite communications and strengthen customer relationships across your business – from marketing and sales to customer service and operations.

Then, if you use monday gmail integration - every email can create an item

Extract integration takes this email land saves updates in board columns.

posts.author: psperry (Accidental Selfie )
posts.cookedHtml: That’s cool stuff. Thanks for the tip.

posts.author: SamEinhorn (Sam Einhorn)
posts.cookedHtml: With Zapier it’s easy to do, Just connect Clicksend to Monday.

posts.author: ByronGriffin (ByronGriffin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

Creating items via text message (SMS/MMS) is a convenient feature that many users would find beneficial, especially for those who are frequently on the go or away from their computers. While this functionality may not be available directly within monday.com at the moment, you could explore third-party integration options or consider submitting a feature request to the monday.com team. It’s possible that they may already have plans to implement such a feature in the future, especially if it’s something that multiple users have expressed interest in.
